title: Vanilla Star Wars
description: A data pack bringing the world of Star Wars to Vanilla Minecraft!
body:
![Vanilla Star Wars Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae392467204638371ccebc97ccd43867c0d553ce.png)
## Overview
This is a data pack that brings the world of Star Wars to Vanilla Minecraft!

The goal of _Vanilla Star Wars_ is to create a polished, performance friendly data pack that adds many of your favourite Star Wars items to the game, in a manner that is as consistent with Vanilla Minecraft's design principles as is possible considering the inherent themeing issues.

## Features
- 3D modelled **lightsabers** in 16 different colors!
- **Blasters** with overheating mechanics!
- Block-breaking **vibroswords**!
- Yoda's favourite **rootleaf stew**!
- **Ration packs**, **polystarch**, and **veg-meat**, as seen in _The Force Awakens_!
- Complete subtitle support!

More additions, such as mobs based on Star Wars creatures, different planets, and spaceships, are planned!

## How to Use
For help with installation, crafting recipes, and more, visit the [Vanilla Star Wars Database](https://sites.google.com/view/vanillastarwars/home).

> ⚠️ **Notice:** Modrinth does not automatically download the required resource pack. Resource packs for each release can be found under the [Versions tab](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-star-wars/versions).
![Resource pack download tutorial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d40c0393865ea4d05ddb6023609b34c549855f73.gif)

## Community
Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/zAkVwb8Ve7) to make suggestions, get help, keep up to date with development, and hang out!

<sup>_You are permitted to use this project in multiplayer servers and for content creation purposes (such as YouTube videos) so long as you give attribution. You may not redistribute this project._</sup>
